summary: AI Chat feature (Chat Agrónomo) tested successfully. All 17 backend tests passed. Frontend shows 5 tabs including new Chat tab. Chat functionality working: sessions sidebar, suggested questions, message sending, AI responses with agricultural context, session history loading.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting (span inside select/option) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Test created and deleted chat sessions during testing. Cleanup performed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chat feature fully working. GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key (real API, not mocked). AI responses take 1-7 seconds. Chat builds agricultural context from user's actual data (parcels, contracts, treatments). 2 existing sessions in database. api.delete() method works correctly for session deletion.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/ai/chat - WORKING (creates new session if session_id empty, returns AI response)
POST /api/ai/chat with session_id - WORKING (maintains conversation context)
GET /api/ai/chat/sessions - WORKING (returns list of user's chat sessions)
All endpoints require auth - WORKING (return 401/403 without token)
frontend_features: AsistenteIA page has 5 tabs (treatments, predictions, contracts, history, chat) - WORKING
Chat tab shows sessions sidebar with 'Conversaciones' header and '+ Nueva' button - WORKING
Chat tab shows 'Agrónomo IA - En línea - GPT-4o' header - WORKING
Chat area shows 'Pregúntale al agrónomo' with 4 suggested questions when empty - WORKING
Suggested questions: 'Tengo hojas amarillas...', 'Que tratamiento uso contra el pulgon?', 'Cuando deberia empezar la cosecha?', 'Que opinas del estado de mis parcelas?' - WORKING
Chat input field with placeholder 'Escribe tu pregunta al agrónomo IA...' - WORKING
Clicking suggested question fills input and sends message - WORKING
AI response bubble displayed with generation time - WORKING
Session history loads when clicking existing session - WORKING
Sessions list shows previous conversations with message count - WORKING

chat_data_snapshot.agricultural_context: AI has access to parcelas, contratos, tratamientos, cosechas, visitas data
